query_text: CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_divcal(    @activity        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;        --        -- set parent @ticket_id        INSERT INTO @divcal_new               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,child_ticket_id               ,divcal_amount               ,selective_refund_amount               ,is_divcal_done               ,activity_id)        SELECT bizdate              ,system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,ticket_id              ,divcal_amount              ,selective_refund_amount              ,is_divcal_done              ,activity_id        FROM   @divcal;        --        -- divcal        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal              @divcal_new,             @system_datetime;        --        -- divcal plc for selective refund        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc              @divcal_plc,             @system_datetime;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_account(    @account dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_account           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,account_no           ,account_transaction_no           ,account_category_id           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.account_no          ,a.account_transaction_no          ,a.account_category          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @account a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_account sra WITH(FORCESEEK) ON sra.system_id = a.system_id AND sra.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.account_no IS NOT NULL AND a.account_no <> '' AND sra.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater(@activity      dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request  dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@account         dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@ticket              dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                      DATETIME2   ,@checkpoint_id               BIGINT = 0)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code                  INT = 0  ,@error_message     NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@i_log_bet_type          TINYINT = 1  ,@is_insert_needed            BIT = 0  ,@is_reverse                  BIT  ,@is_cancel_reverse           BIT;DECLARE    @activity_id                    BIGINT  ,@system_id                     TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id                BIGINT  ,@parent_sell_request_id         BIGINT  ,@log_bet_type                  TINYINT  ,@log_bet_category              TINYINT  ,@last_ticket_action            TINYINT  ,@ticket_id                      BIGINT  ,@counter_offer_id               BIGINT  ,@collation_sequence             BIGINT  ,@account_no                VARCHAR(16)  ,@account_category                  INT  ,@centre_no                         INT  ,@channel_type                  TINYINT  ,@window_no                    SMALLINT  ,@is_on_course                      BIT  ,@result_code                       INT  ,@unit_bet               DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@financial_index               TINYINT  ,@flag                          TINYINT  ,@remark                   VARCHAR(250)  ,@reject_code                  SMALLINT  ,@reject_reason            VARCHAR(250)  ,@activity_code                 TINYINT  ,@activity_type                 TINYINT  ,@message_type                  TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status           TINYINT  ,@ticket_status                 TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type            TINYINT  ,@collation_type                TINYINT  ,@bet_intercept_reason          TINYINT  ,@bizdate                          DATE  ,@request_at                  DATETIME2  ,@sports_id                     TINYINT;--SELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id  ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id  ,@counter_offer_id = counter_offer_id  ,@centre_no = centre_no  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@window_no = window_no  ,@is_on_course = is_on_course  ,@unit_bet = unit_bet_updated--unit_bet  ,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = bizdate  ,@request_at = request_at  ,@flag = flag  ,@remark = remark  ,@reject_code = reject_code  ,@reject_reason = reject_reason  ,@sports_id = sports_idFROM   @sell_request;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@activity_type = activity_type  ,@message_type = message_type  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_type  ,@bet_intercept_reason = bet_intercept_reason  ,@collation_sequence = collation_sequence  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;SELECT @account_no = account_no  ,@account_category = account_categoryFROM   @account;--SELECT @centre_no = centre_no--FROM   @location;---- Delete log_bet record for sell undo and ticket cancel undo caseSELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_idFROM   @ticket;--SELECT @is_reverse = is_reverse  ,@is_cancel_reverse = is_cancel_reverseFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_statusWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;IF @is_reverse = 1 -- Sell Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 1; -- AcceptEND;IF @is_cancel_reverse = 1 -- Ticket Cancel Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 2 AND log_bet_category = 6; -- Reject, CancelEND;---- check all possible bet_type for each sell_requestWHILE @i_log_bet_type < 4 -- 1 Accept, 2 Reject, 3 Counter OfferBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 0;SET @log_bet_category = 0;-- check @activity_statusIF @i_log_bet_type = 1 -- accept   AND @activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY   AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD   AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3) --REVERSE_CANCELBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;SET @log_bet_category = @counter_offer_type;--SELECT @unit_bet = unit_bet FROM  @ticket;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 2 -- reject   AND @result_code > 0 -- AP indicated reject   AND (@ticket_status <> 5 OR @ticket_status IS NULL) -- null: for request rejected by AP-- AND @checkpoint_id; > 0 -- from RM-- AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL-- AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTEDBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 2xx Customer / Trader / System / Customer Timeout / Trader Timeout--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @sell_request_status = 8; -- Customer?SELECT @log_bet_category = 3; -- defaultSELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @sell_request_status = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3--WHERE  @sell_request_status = 9;SELECT @log_bet_category = 4WHERE  @sell_request_status = 7;SELECT @log_bet_category = 5WHERE  @sell_request_status = 6;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 3 -- counter offer   AND @sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED   AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFERBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 3xx Trader / SystemMNL / SystemOdds--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @counter_offer_type = 3;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 2 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 7;-- 3xx System / Trader: after FR_4613 simplification on 2020-05-06SELECT @log_bet_category = 1WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(1,2);SELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(3);END;--IF @is_insert_needed = 1 -- insert accept / reject / counter offer   AND NOT(@is_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 1) -- Sell Undo already, no need to insert Accept record   AND NOT(@is_cancel_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6) -- Cancel Undo already, no need to insert Reject Cancel recordBEGIN-- special handling for ticket cancelIF @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6 -- Reject, CancelBEGINSELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id   --,@centre_no = centre_no  --,@unit_bet = unit_bet   --,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = sell_bizdate  ,@request_at = sell_datetime--,@flag = flag--,@remark = remark--,@reject_code = reject_code--,@reject_reason = reject_reasonFROM   @ticket;END;--SET @log_bet_type = @i_log_bet_type;INSERT INTO dbo.log_bet   (activity_id   ,system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,log_bet_type   ,log_bet_category   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,collation_sequence   ,account_no   ,account_category   ,channel_type   ,window_no   ,is_on_course   ,centre_no   ,unit_bet   ,financial_index   ,flag   ,remark   ,reject_code   ,reject_reason   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,checkpoint_id   ,activity_bizdate   ,activity_at   ,create_at   ,update_at)VALUES   (@activity_id   ,@system_id   ,@sell_request_id   ,@parent_sell_request_id   ,@log_bet_type   ,@log_bet_category   ,@ticket_id   ,@sports_id   ,@counter_offer_id   ,@collation_sequence   ,@account_no   ,@account_category   ,@channel_type   ,@window_no   ,@is_on_course   ,@centre_no   ,@unit_bet   ,@financial_index   ,@flag   ,@remark   ,@reject_code   ,@reject_reason   ,@activity_code   ,@activity_type   ,@message_type   ,@sell_request_status   ,@ticket_status   ,@counter_offer_type   ,@collation_type   ,@bet_intercept_reason   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@bizdate   ,@request_at   ,@now   ,@now);END;SET @i_log_bet_type+=1;END;END;

system_id  ,@sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,leg_no  ,leg_order  ,financial_index  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_id  ,unit_bet  ,odds  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,0 CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_log_event_verify_and_insert(--Input Parameters@meta          dbo.udt_message READONLY   ,@checkpoint_id          BIGINT OUTPUT)ASBEGIN-- Set NOCOUNT ON for performanceSET NOCOUNT ON;DECLARE    @now                      DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@bizdate                       DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,@return_code                 BIGINT = 0  ,@count_row                   BIGINT = 0  ,@db_id                       BIGINT  ,@message               VARCHAR(250)  ,@staging_checkpoint_id       BIGINT  ,@message_status             TINYINT;--check if input parameter is exactly 1 or notSELECT @count_row = COUNT(*)FROM   @meta;IF @count_row <> 1BEGINSELECT @message = 'Only one row is expected.';THROW 50001,@message,1;END;SELECT TOP 1 @staging_checkpoint_id = checkpoint_id,@message_status = message_statusFROM         @meta;IF @staging_checkpoint_id IS NULLBEGIN --LogEventStagingHandler, LogMessageHandler-- duplication checkSELECT @count_row = COUNT(*)  ,@db_id = MAX(le.checkpoint_id)FROM   dbo.log_event le   INNER JOIN @meta m ON le.topic_name = m.topic_name AND le.producer_id = m.producer_id AND le.version_id = m.version_id AND le.topic_seq_num = m.topic_seq_num AND le.service_instance_num = m.service_instance_num AND le.service_node_num = m.service_node_numWHERE  le.message_status NOT IN(3,4); --Fail, ValidationError;IF @count_row > 0BEGINSELECT @message = 'Record already handled and exist in log_event table. (checkpoint_id='+CONVERT(VARCHAR(50),@db_id)+')';THROW 50002,@message,1;END;-- insertSELECT @checkpoint_id = NEXT VALUE FOR dbo.seq_checkpoint_id;INSERT INTO dbo.log_event   (checkpoint_id   ,bizdate   ,topic_name   ,service_node_num   ,producer_id   ,version_id   ,topic_seq_num   ,message_status   ,service_type   ,service_instance_num   ,event_type   ,usp_name   ,meta_header   ,msg   ,activity_id   ,remark   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_metaheader   ,gzip_msg)SELECT @checkpoint_id  ,@bizdate  ,topic_name  ,service_node_num  ,producer_id  ,version_id  ,topic_seq_num  ,message_status  ,service_type  ,service_instance_num  ,event_type  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- meta_header  ,NULL   -- msg  ,activity_id  ,remark  ,@now  ,@now  ,gzip_metaheader  ,gzip_msgFROM   @meta;END;ELSEBEGIN--event staging service->message handlerSELECT @checkpoint_id = @staging_checkpoint_id;UPDATE leSET    le.message_status = meta.message_status,le.service_node_num = meta.service_node_num,le.service_instance_num = meta.service_instance_num,le.usp_name = meta.usp_name,le.remark = meta.remark,le.update_at = @nowFROM   dbo.log_event le   INNER JOIN @meta meta ON le.checkpoint_id = meta.checkpoint_idWHERE  le.checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_id;END;--update log_checkpoint_recovery tableIF @message_status = 0BEGINIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_checkpoint_pendingWHERE  checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_id)BEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_checkpoint_pending   (checkpoint_id   ,service_type   ,service_instance_num   ,service_node_num   ,topic_name)SELECT @checkpoint_id  ,service_type  ,service_instance_num  ,service_node_num  ,topic_nameFROM   @meta;END;END;ELSEBEGINDELETE FROM dbo.log_checkpoint_pendingWHERE       checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_id;END;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;-- return the checkpointRETURN @return_code;END;

@tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater(@sell_request     dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg          dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@now                         DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0;DECLARE    @bizdate                DATE  ,@channel_type        TINYINT  ,@channel_device_type TINYINT  ,@channel_report_type TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT  ,@db_activity_id       BIGINT = 0  ,@db_exists               BIT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id      BIGINT;SELECT @bizdate = bizdate  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@channel_device_type = channel_device_type  ,@channel_report_type = channel_report_type  ,@activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_idFROM   @sell_request;IF @@rowcount = 0BEGINRETURN; -- sell_request record not found, skipEND;-- get db activity_idSELECT @db_activity_id = update_activity_id  ,@db_exists = 1FROM   dbo.sell_request WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE  @system_id = system_id AND @sell_request_id = sell_request_idORDER BY update_activity_id DESC;-- skip update if db record is newerIF @db_activity_id >= @activity_idBEGINRETURN;END;IF @db_exists = 1BEGINUPDATE dbsrSET    dbsr.parent_sell_request_id = sr.parent_sell_request_id,dbsr.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id,dbsr.unit_bet_updated = sr.unit_bet_updated,dbsr.investment_updated = sr.investment_updated,dbsr.tsn = sr.tsn,dbsr.rtsn = sr.rtsn,dbsr.bet_line = sr.bet_line,dbsr.update_at = @now,dbsr.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request dbsr WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @sell_request sr ON dbsr.system_id = sr.system_id AND dbsr.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id;UPDATE dbsrlSET    dbsrl.odds_counter_offered = srl.odds_counter_offered,dbsrl.update_at = @now,dbsrl.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request_leg dbsrl WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @leg srl ON dbsrl.system_id = srl.system_id AND dbsrl.sell_request_id = srl.sell_request_id AND dbsrl.pool_id = srl.pool_id AND dbsrl.line_id = srl.line_id AND dbsrl.combination_id = srl.combination_id;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.sell_request   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,odds_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_formula   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,request_at   ,location_type   ,channel_type   ,channel_device_type   ,channel_report_type   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,financial_index   ,num_bet   ,unit_bet   ,unit_bet_updated   ,investment   ,investment_updated   ,tsn   ,rtsn   ,bet_line   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,race_no   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,parent_sell_request_id  ,ticket_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,odds_type  ,is_allup  ,allup_level  ,allup_formula  ,allup_type  ,@bizdate  ,request_at  ,location_type  ,channel_type  ,channel_device_type  ,channel_report_type  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,financial_index  ,num_bet  ,unit_bet  ,unit_bet_updated  ,investment  ,investment_updated  ,tsn  ,rtsn  ,bet_line  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,race_no  ,@now  ,activity_id  ,@now  ,activity_idFROM   @sell_request;INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_leg   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,bizdate   ,sports_id   ,leg_order   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,combination_order   ,is_inplay   ,odds   ,odds_counter_offered   ,ems_sequence   ,event_id   ,event_operation_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,sports_id  ,leg_order  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_order  ,is_inplay  ,odds  ,odds_counter_offered  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,event_operation_status  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @leg;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_ba_rpt_1111(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, ISNULL(ticket.ticket_id, 0)AS ticket_id,--for gen ReferenceTSNISNULL(ticket.is_fixed_odds, 0)AS is_fixed_odds,--for gen ReferenceTSNISNULL(ticket.content_verifier, 0)AS content_verifier,--for gen ReferenceTSNCASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' ENDAS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,(case when ticket.all_up_level = 1 then ticket.bet_type_id when ticket.all_up_level > 1 then 0 end)AS BetType,ISNULL(isnull(ticket.paid_time, ticket.parent_paid_time), cast('1900-01-01 00:00:00' as datetime)) AS PayoutTime,--''AS ReferenceTSN,CASE WHENticket.total_payout_amt > 0THEN ticket.total_payout_amtELSE ticket.previous_payout_amtENDAS  PaidAmount,ticket.div_cal_amt AS  DividendAmount,CONCAT(ISNULL(ticket.ticket_betline, '')    , ' '    ,CAST(FORMAT(ticket.create_time,'dd-MMM-yy HH:mm:ss')AS VARCHAR(100))    , ' ',REPLICATE('0',4-LEN(ticket.selling_centre_no))+CAST(ticket.selling_centre_no AS VARCHAR),'/', CAST(ticket.selling_window_no AS VARCHAR),' DIV.',CASE WHEN ticket.is_claim=1 THEN ' PAYMENT STOPPED' ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office=1 THEN ' PAY AT HEAD OFFICE' ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.release_to_centre_no<>0 THEN ' PAY AT BRANCH' ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.release_to_centre_no<>0 THEN ' '+CAST(ticket.release_to_centre_no AS VARCHAR(10)) ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN ticket.is_reversed=1 THEN ' REVERSED' ELSE '' END,':$',CAST(FORMAT(ISNULL(CASE WHEN ticket.ticket_status=7 THEN ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE ticket.div_cal_amt END,0)/100.00,'N','en-us') AS VARCHAR(100)), ' AP:$',CAST(FORMAT(ISNULL(ticket.previous_payout_amt,0)/100.00,'N','en-us') AS VARCHAR(100)), ' AP-CNT:', RIGHT('0'+CAST(ticket.generation_no AS VARCHAR),2), ' CP:$',CAST(FORMAT(ISNULL((CASE WHEN ticket.ticket_status=7 THEN ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE ticket.div_cal_amt END) - ticket.previous_payout_amt,0)/100.00,'N','en-us') AS VARCHAR(100)),CASE WHEN ticket.ticket_status=7 THEN CASE WHEN ticket.paid_method=0 THEN ' (PAID - READER) ' ELSE ' (PAID - KEY) ' END      WHEN ticket.ticket_status=8 THEN CASE WHEN ticket.paid_method=0 THEN ' (PARTIAL PAID - READER) ' ELSE ' (PARTIAL PAID - KEY) ' END  WHEN ticket.ticket_status=5 THEN CASE WHEN ticket.paid_method=0 THEN ' (CANCELLED - READER) ' ELSE ' (CANCELLED - KEY) ' END  ELSE ' ' END,ISNULL(CAST(FORMAT(ticket.paid_time,'dd-MMM-yy HH:mm:ss')AS VARCHAR(100))+' ',''),ISNULL(CASE WHEN ticket.ticket_status=2 THEN '' ELSE REPLICATE('0',4-LEN(ticket.pay_centre_no))+CAST(ticket.pay_centre_no AS VARCHAR)+' ' END,''),ISNULL(REPLACE(ticket.remote_system_name,'0',''),'')   )    AS BetDetailsFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.content_verifier,ft.is_fixed_odds,ftc.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date AS kick_off_date,ftb.ticket_betline,ft.paid_time,parent_ft.paid_time as parent_paid_time,ft.all_up_level,ftc.bet_type_id,ft.total_payout_amt,ft.previous_payout_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,--ft.selling_time,    ft.create_time,                    ft.generation_no,                    fts.selling_centre_no,                    fts.selling_window_no,                    fts.pay_centre_no,                    ft.paid_method,                    ft.ticket_status,                    ft.is_claim,                    ft.is_reversed,                    ft.is_head_office,                    ft.release_to_centre_no,                    rs.remote_system_name-- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, -- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, -- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftc.pool_idLEFT JOIN fo_activities_pay_vw fap on ft.paid_fo_activity_id = fap.fo_activity_id            LEFT JOIN remote_systems rs on fap.paid_system_id = rs.remote_system_idLEFT JOIN fo_tickets_vw parent_ft on parent_ft.ticket_id = ft.parent_ticket_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 0AND ft.ticket_status <> 3 --REJECTEDANDftc.leg_order = 1ANDftc.combination_order = 1AND ftd.concluded_bizdate = @bizdateAND ((ftd.div_cal_amt <> ft.total_payout_amt AND ft.is_paid_final = 1) -- error loss + profit deal to result changeOR(ftd.div_cal_amt < ft.previous_payout_amt AND ft.paid_bizdate is NULL) -- error loss on pay more in last partial pay)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketORDER BY ticket.sports_id, ticket.ticket_id,ticket.is_fixed_odds,ticket.content_verifier, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END, ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0) OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_dummy_activity_insert(    -- activity    @tvp_activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg          NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0          ,@is_retry    BIT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2();    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @tvp_activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;IF(@return_code = 50002)BEGINDECLARE  @system_id         TINYINT,@activity_id        BIGINT;SELECT@system_id = system_id,@activity_id = activity_id FROM @tvp_activity;EXEC dbo.uspx_defer_activity_update  @system_id, @activity_id, 1, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;            END            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_scheduler_log_task_get(--Input Parameters@bizdate             DATE -- output   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count            INT = 0  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@now_with_offset DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();-- Get Pool DescriptionBEGIN TRYBEGIN TRANSACTION;IF @bizdate IS NULLBEGINSET @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_bizdate();END;DECLARE    @schedule_task TABLE(task_id    BIGINT);UPDATE aSET    a.task_status = 1,a.no_of_execution = ISNULL(a.no_of_execution,0)+1,a.update_at = @nowOUTPUT inserted.task_id   INTO @schedule_taskFROM   dbo.log_task aWHERE  a.bizdate <= @bizdate AND a.task_status = 0 AND a.task_type = 2-- 1:report, 2:adhocAND (a.schedule_at IS NULL OR a.schedule_at < @now_with_offset);-- tasksSELECT b.task_id  ,b.bizdate  ,b.task_type  ,b.task_status  ,b.schedule_at  ,b.checkpoint_id  ,b.no_of_execution  ,c.task_handlerFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_task b ON b.task_id = a.task_id   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task c ON c.task_id = a.task_idORDER BY b.task_id;-- task default parametersSELECT a.task_id  ,b.parameter_name  ,b.parameter_type  ,b.parameter_valueFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task_parameter b ON a.task_id = b.task_idORDER BY b.task_id,b.parameter_name;COMMIT TRANSACTION;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;RETURN @return_code;END;

insert bulk dbo.previous_day_activities([arc_src_system_id] tinyint,[activity_id] bigint,[activity_bizdate] int,[activity_time] datetime2(7),[activity_code] int,[terminal_id] varchar(10) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[terminal_msn] int,[centre_no] int,[window_no] smallint,[account_no] varchar(16) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[account_trxn_no] smallint,[source_system_id] tinyint,[source_activity_id] bigint,[dest_system_id] tinyint,[terminal_session_id] bigint,[customer_session_id] bigint,[bet_category] tinyint,[ticket_type] int,[ticket_id] bigint,[child_ticket_id] bigint,[is_prelog] tinyint,[is_timeout] tinyint,[is_rcv] tinyint,[pocket_type] tinyint,[result_code] int,[result_text] varchar(1000) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[result_binary] varbinary(8000),[error_text] varchar(500) collate Latin1_General_BIN2,[data_grouping_bizdate] int)

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_save_sell_request(@activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY)RETURNS BITASBEGINDECLARE    @need_save BIT = 0;-- activity status:DECLARE    @activity_code       TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status TINYINT  ,@ticket_status       TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type  TINYINT  ,@collation_type      TINYINT;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_typeFROM   @activity;-- check statusIF ---- accept(@activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3)) --REVERSE_CANCELOR ---- reject((@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTED) OR ---- reject: cancel(@collation_type = 2 --CANCEL AND @ticket_status = 5 --CANCELLED) OR ---- counter offer(@sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFER) OR ---- counter offer confirmed@activity_code = 5 --COUNTER_OFFER_CONFIRMBEGINSET @need_save = 1;END;RETURN @need_save;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1523](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)END--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemDECLARE @system_id int select @system_id = system_id from system_info-- agpSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTicketWithLiability,ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END), 0)AS TicketLiabilityAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfHOLiabilityTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END)AS HOLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt > ticket.total_payout_amt AND ticket.total_payout_amt > 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfErrorProfitTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt > ticket.total_payout_amt AND ticket.total_payout_amt > 0 THEN  ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS ErrorProfitAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and (ticket.div_cal_amt < ticket.total_payout_amt) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfErrorLossTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and (ticket.div_cal_amt < ticket.total_payout_amt)THEN  ticket.total_payout_amt - ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS ErrorLossAmount,  -- when batch divcal max(fmcd.last_payout_bizdate)  wagering status of the pool is PayoutStarted today (Business date).COUNT(CASE WHEN (ticket.refund_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt, 0)) <> 0) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfRefundTickets,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.refund_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt, 0)) <> 0) THEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt, 0)) ELSE 0 END)AS RefundLiabilityAmount FROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,edabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ft.payout_expire_bizdate,ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate,ftd.is_concluded,AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS actual_div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for same ticketAVG(previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for parent ticketAVG(previous_ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_refund_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_id        INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                    INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw previous_ftd on ft.parent_ticket_id = previous_ftd.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( -- check previous latest dividend historyselect a.ticket_id, a.div_cal_amt, a.actual_div_cal_amt, a.bizdate, a.refund_amt from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ainner join ( select ftdbb.ticket_id , max(bizdate) as bizdate from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ftdbbinner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd on ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate and ftdbb.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idwhere ftdbb.bizdate < @bizdate group by ftdbb.ticket_id) b on a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id and a.bizdate = b.bizdate) previous_ftdbb on previous_ftdbb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 0--AND fad.valid_bizdate = @bizdate--which result rectification/refund taken place today AND ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate -- fo_activities_divcal_vw not include case that divcal during payAND (ftd.div_cal_amt > 0 or previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt > 0 or previous_ftd.div_cal_amt > 0)AND ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8) --AND fmps.pool_status = 41--41PayoutStarted     AND fme.event_type_id = 1--AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--14, 16, 18, 19, 20, 32, 33, 34/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')*/--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_get_ba_rpt_1301(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS CentreNo,ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, case WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN ticket.bet_type_id ELSE 0 ENDAS BetType,CASE WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 ENDAS isAllUp,SUM(ticket.ticket_count)AS NoOfTicketSold,SUM(ticket.ticket_cost_amt)AS PrimaryInvestmentOfTicketSold,0 AS AllUpReinvestmentFROM (SELECT--DISTINCT1 as ticket_count,ft.ticket_id, orig_fts.selling_centre_no, ft.sports_id,ftb.frontend_id, ft.all_up_level,pools.bet_type_id,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_cost_amt--AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools pools ON ftb.pool_id = pools.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw orig_fts ON ft.orig_ticket_id = orig_fts.ticket_idWHERE ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7)AND ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdateUNIONSELECTDISTINCT -1 as ticket_count,ft.ticket_id, fts.selling_centre_no, ft.sports_id,ftb.frontend_id, fts.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_idWHERE cancel.ticket_status = 5 AND cancel.create_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.sports_id, CASE WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN bet_type_id ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN ticket.all_up_level = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_get_ba_rpt_1181(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622 IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDDECLARE @late_pay_bizdate intset @late_pay_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 15)SELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' ENDAS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,SUM(ticket_count) AS NoOfTicketSold,SUM(ticket_cost_amt) AS InvestmentOfTicketSold,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 0 or ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfPayoutTicket,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 0 or ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.total_payout_amt  ELSE 0 END)) AS PayoutOfTicketPaid,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfHOTicketPaidByBranch,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) THEN ticket.total_payout_amt  ELSE 0 END)) AS PayoutOfHOTicketPaidByBranch,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfLatePayoutTicket,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)) AS LatePayoutOfTicketPaid,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0 and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfHOTicketLatePaidByBranch,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0 and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)) AS LatePayoutOfHOTicketPaidByBranchFROM (SELECTDISTINCT (CASE WHEN (ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate AND ISNULL(ft.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ticket_count,ft.parent_ticket_id,ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.create_bizdate,ftc.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,ft.paid_bizdate,ft.is_head_office,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.release_to_centre_no,(ft.total_payout_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt) as total_payout_amt,(CASE WHEN (ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate AND ISNULL(ft.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0 ) THEN ft.ticket_cost_amt  ELSE 0 END) as ticket_cost_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,ftd.refund_amt,ftd.settle_bizdateFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftc.pool_idWHERE ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7, 8)ANDftc.leg_order = 1AND (ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate OR ft.paid_bizdate = @bizdate)UNIONSELECTDISTINCT -1 as ticket_count,ft.parent_ticket_id,ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.create_bizdate,ftb.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,ft.paid_bizdate,ft.is_head_office,ft.selling_bizdate,0 as release_to_centre_no,0 as total_payout_amt,-ft.ticket_cost_amt as ticket_cost_amt,0 as div_cal_amt,0 as refund_amt,0 as settle_bizdateFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idWHERE cancel.ticket_status = 5 AND cancel.create_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.sports_id, (CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END), ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0) OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

       ,@record_no         INT          ,@no_of_batch       INT = 10000          ,@return_code       INT = 0          ,@retry_count       INT = 10          ,@retry             INT          ,@row_num        BIGINT = 0;    --common variable    DECLARE            @ticket_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_batch;    --cancelled ticket    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp @cashout_single_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    DECLARE            @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    ----allup    DECLARE
