CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update(    @tvp_ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@count                   INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_id            TINYINT          ,@ticket_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_id           BIGINT          ,@activity_bizdate        DATE          ,@activity_at        DATETIME2          ,@ticket_status        TINYINT          ,@last_ticket_status   TINYINT          ,@sell_activity_id      BIGINT          ,@sell_bizdate            DATE          ,@sell_at            DATETIME2          ,@pay_activity_id       BIGINT          ,@pay_bizdate             DATE          ,@pay_at             DATETIME2          ,@cancel_activity_id    BIGINT          ,@cancel_bizdate          DATE          ,@cancel_at          DATETIME2          ,@is_reverse               BIT          ,@is_pay                   BIT          ,@is_cancel                BIT          ,@is_cancel_reverse        BIT          ,@last_ticket_action   TINYINT          ,@last_activity_id      BIGINT;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@activity_bizdate = activity_bizdate          ,@activity_at = activity_at          ,@ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    IF @@rowcount <> 1    BEGIN        SELECT @error_code = 50001              ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';        THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;    END;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history_mem           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND activity_id > @activity_id    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;    IF @@rowcount = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @ticket_status = @last_ticket_status;    END;    -- determine the sell_activity_id    IF @ticket_action = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @count = COUNT(*)        FROM   dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND ticket_action = 2;        IF @count = 0        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = @activity_id                  ,@sell_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                  ,@sell_at = @activity_at                  ,@is_reverse = 0;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 2        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4            BEGIN                SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                            ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 3 OR ticket_action = 4)                ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                -- Payout is the last one                IF @last_ticket_action = 3                BEGIN                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = @last_activity_id                          ,@pay_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                          ,@pay_at = @activity_at                          ,@is_pay = 1;                END;                    ELSE                BEGIN -- UNDO is the last one                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = NULL                          ,@pay_bizdate = NULL                          ,@pay_at = NULL                          ,@is_pay = 0;                END;            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6                BEGIN                    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                                ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 5 OR ticket_action = 6)                    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                    IF @last_ticket_action = 5                    BEGIN                        -- Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = @last_activity_id                              ,@cancel_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                              ,@cancel_at = @activity_at                              ,@is_cancel = 1                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 0;                    END;                        ELSE                    BEGIN                        -- UNDO Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = NULL                              ,@cancel_bizdate = NULL                              ,@cancel_at = NULL                              ,@is_cancel = 0                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 1;                    END;                END;            END;        END;    END;    IF @ticket_action = 1 OR @ticket_action = 2    BEGIN        UPDATE dbo.ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;--unsettled ticket status UPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4        BEGIN            UPDATE dbo.ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6            BEGIN                UPDATE dbo.ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;            END;        END;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_summary_snapshot_finacial_refresh(@task_id             BIGINT   ,@checkpoint_id       BIGINT   ,@pool_id             BIGINT   ,@bizdate               DATE   ,@update_at     DATETIME2(7)   ,@return_msg    VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @now                   DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@tran_count                  INT = 0  ,@return_code                 INT = 0  ,@payout_date                DATE  ,@event_id                 BIGINT  ,@affected_single_count       INT  ,@affected_allup_count        INT;SELECT @payout_date = ISNULL(payout_start_bizdate,refund_bizdate)  ,@event_id = event_idFROM   dbo.poolsWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYUPDATE fSET    f.settle_bizdate = @bizdate,f.settle_status = 2,f.update_at = @now,f.checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_idFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single s ON s.system_id = f.system_id AND s.ticket_id = f.ticket_id AND s.bet_id = f.bet_id AND s.pool_id = @pool_id;SET @affected_single_count = @@rowcount;UPDATE fSET    f.settle_bizdate = @bizdate,f.settle_status = 2,f.update_at = @now,f.checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_idFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination cWHERE  f.system_id = c.system_id AND f.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = c.bet_id AND c.pool_id = @pool_id);SET @affected_allup_count = @@rowcount;IF @payout_date IS NOT NULLBEGININSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,settle_bizdate   ,settle_status   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,is_allup   ,bet_type   ,allup_level   ,unit_bet   ,profit_loss   ,investment   ,refund   ,pay_odds   ,dividend   ,cashout_status   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,a.bet_id  ,@bizdate  ,2  ,a.sports_id  ,a.event_type  ,@event_id  ,@pool_id  ,a.line_id  ,0  ,a.bet_type  ,1  ,a.unit_bet  ,0  ,0  ,0  ,a.odds  ,0  ,0  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@now  ,@nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status ts ON a.system_id = ts.system_id AND a.ticket_id = ts.ticket_id AND ts.is_reverse = 0 AND ts.is_cancel = 0WHERE  a.pool_id = @pool_id AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  a.system_id = f.system_id AND a.ticket_id = f.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = f.bet_id);SET @affected_single_count = @@rowcount+@affected_single_count;INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,settle_bizdate   ,settle_status   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,event_id   ,is_allup   ,bet_type   ,allup_level   ,unit_bet   ,profit_loss   ,investment   ,refund   ,dividend   ,cashout_status   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,a.bet_id  ,@bizdate  ,2  ,a.sports_id  ,a.event_type  ,@event_id  ,1  ,a.allup_type  ,a.allup_level  ,a.unit_bet  ,0  ,0  ,0  ,0  ,0  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@now  ,@nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup a   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status ts ON a.system_id = ts.system_id AND a.ticket_id = ts.ticket_id AND ts.is_reverse = 0 AND ts.is_cancel = 0WHERE  EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination bWHERE  a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id AND b.pool_id = @pool_id) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  a.system_id = f.system_id AND a.ticket_id = f.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = f.bet_id);SET @affected_allup_count = @@rowcount+@affected_allup_count;END;UPDATE dbo.log_summary_snapshot_taskSET    task_status = 2,update_at = @now,affected_allup_count = @affected_allup_count,affected_single_count = @affected_single_count,checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_idWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND task_id <= @task_id AND task_status IN(0,1) AND is_today = 1;SET @return_msg = 'A total of '+CAST(@affected_single_count AS VARCHAR(50))+' single bets and  '+CAST(@affected_allup_count AS VARCHAR(50))+' all-up bets have been updated.';-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  END;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_counter_offer(    @activity                   dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request               dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@data         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@now                                   DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@i                       INT = 1;    DECLARE            @system_id              TINYINT          ,@sell_request_id         BIGINT          ,@parent_sell_request_id  BIGINT          ,@activity_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_code          TINYINT          ,@sell_request_status    TINYINT          ,@bizdate                   DATE;    -- prepare    SELECT @activity_code = activity_code          ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status    FROM   @activity;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id          ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@bizdate = bizdate    FROM   @sell_request;    --    -- Update Parent Sell Request Counter Offer Status    IF @parent_sell_request_id > 0 AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND sell_request_id = @parent_sell_request_id    )    BEGIN        INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status               (system_id               ,sell_request_id               ,bizdate               ,counter_offer_status               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        VALUES               (@system_id               ,@parent_sell_request_id               ,@bizdate               ,1 -- Accept               ,@activity_id               ,@now               ,@activity_id               ,@now);    END;    --    -- Update Current Sell Request Counter Offer Status    DECLARE            @counter_offer_status TINYINT = 0; -- None, default    -- Accept Case:    SELECT @counter_offer_status = 1 -- Accept    WHERE  @activity_code = 5 --COUNTER_OFFER_CONFIRM           AND @sell_request_status <> 3; --AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT    -- Reject Case:    SELECT @counter_offer_status = 2 -- Reject    WHERE  @activity_code IN(6,7) --CUSTOMER_ABORT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT           AND @sell_request_status IN(8); --ABORTED    --    IF @sell_request_id > 0 AND @counter_offer_status <> 0 AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND sell_request_id = @sell_request_id    )    BEGIN        INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status               (system_id               ,sell_request_id               ,bizdate               ,counter_offer_status               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        VALUES               (@system_id               ,@sell_request_id               ,@bizdate               ,@counter_offer_status               ,@activity_id               ,@now               ,@activity_id               ,@now);    END;    --sell_request_counter_offer    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,counter_offer_id           ,record_at           ,unit_bet           ,total_investment           ,unit_bet_prev           ,total_investment_prev           ,managed_by           ,create_activity_id           ,create_at           ,update_activity_id           ,update_at)    SELECT @system_id          ,s.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,s.counter_offer_id          ,s.record_at          ,s.unit_bet          ,s.total_investment          ,s.unit_bet_prev          ,s.total_investment_prev          ,s.managed_by          ,@activity_id          ,@now          ,@activity_id          ,@now    FROM   @data s           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_counter_offer t WITH (FORCESEEK) ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.sell_request_id = s.sell_request_id AND t.counter_offer_id = s.counter_offer_id    WHERE  t.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_scheduler_log_task_status_update(--Input Parameters@task_id            BIGINT   ,@task_status       TINYINT   --Output Parameters    ,@return_msg  NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count            INT = 0  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@now_with_offset DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYEXECUTE @return_code = dbo.uspx_scheduler_log_task_status_update @task_id,@task_status,@now,@return_msg OUT;EXECUTE @return_code = dbo.uspx_scheduler_log_adhoc_task_update @task_id,@now,@return_msg OUT;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_pool_odds_true_change(--Meta Data@checkpoint                            BIGINT = 0   ,@operation_type                   VARCHAR(50)--Input Parameters   ,@data           dbo.udt_pool_odds_true_change READONLY)ASBEGINDECLARE    @now     DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@bizdate      DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate();--MERGE INTO dbo.pool_odds_true_change /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS dstUSING(SELECT pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,begin_at  ,bizdate  ,odds_true  ,odds_true_opinionFROM   @data) AS srcON src.pool_id = dst.pool_id AND src.line_id = dst.line_id AND src.combination_id = dst.combination_id AND src.begin_at = dst.begin_atWHEN MATCHED  THEN UPDATE SET   odds_true = src.odds_true,  odds_true_opinion = src.odds_true_opinion,  checkpoint_id = @checkpoint,  update_at = @nowWHEN NOT MATCHED  THEN  INSERT(bizdate,pool_id,line_id,combination_id,begin_at,end_at,odds_true,odds_true_opinion,checkpoint_id,create_at,update_at)  VALUES (ISNULL(src.bizdate,@bizdate) ,src.pool_id ,src.line_id ,src.combination_id ,src.begin_at ,'9999-12-31' ,src.odds_true ,src.odds_true_opinion ,@checkpoint ,@now ,@now);---- TODO: add script to update end_at field for later use; at the moment, no place is using end_at field from this table.END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_payout(    @activity       dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@payout        dbo.udt_ticket_payout READONLY   ,@ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg            NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0          ,@result_code       INT;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY                SELECT @result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        --result_code>0, that mean this is a invalid payout        IF @result_code IS NULL OR @result_code = 0        BEGIN            -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay            DECLARE                    @system_id                       TINYINT                  ,@ticket_id                        BIGINT      ,@activity_id BIGINT                  ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT = 3 -- payout                  ,@payout_amount            DECIMAL(28,12)                  ,@activity_code                   TINYINT                  ,@payout_new        dbo.udt_ticket_payout                  ,@ticket_status_new dbo.udt_ticket_status;            SELECT @system_id = system_id                  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id                  ,@payout_amount = payout_amount            FROM   @payout;            SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id            FROM   dbo.ticket_payout            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;            SELECT @activity_code = activity_code,       @activity_id = activity_id            FROM   @activity;            --            -- ticket action            -- TODO: duoble check/confirm for ticket_action 3,4,7,8            SELECT @ticket_action = 4 -- payout undo                  ,@payout_amount = @payout_amount*-1            FROM   @payout            WHERE  @activity_code = 20; -- REVERSE_PAY_TICKET                    /*            -- currently, there  is no cancel & undo cancel cases            SELECT @ticket_action = 7 -- payout cancel                  ,@payout_amount = @payout_amount*-1            FROM   @payout            WHERE  collation_type = 4; -- PARTIAL_PAY_CANCEL            SELECT @ticket_action = 8 -- payout cancel undo            FROM   @payout            WHERE  collation_type = 5; -- REVERSE_PARTIAL_PAY_CANCEL            */            --            -- set parent @ticket_id, @ticket_action, @payout_amount            INSERT INTO @payout_new                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,activity_id       ,payout_bizdate                   ,ticket_action                   ,collation_type                   ,is_partial                   ,shroff_amount                   ,payout_amount                   ,payout_at                   ,process_location                   ,centre_no                   ,window_no                   ,next_ticket_id                   ,next_tsn                   ,is_headoffice                   ,next_rtsn)            SELECT @system_id                  ,@ticket_id                  ,activity_id      ,payout_bizdate                  ,@ticket_action                  ,collation_type                  ,is_partial                  ,shroff_amount                  ,@payout_amount                  ,payout_at                  ,process_location                  ,centre_no                  ,window_no                  ,next_ticket_id                  ,next_tsn                  ,is_headoffice                  ,next_rtsn            FROM   @payout;            INSERT INTO @ticket_status_new                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,activity_id                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,activity_at                   ,ticket_status)            SELECT system_id                  ,ticket_id                  ,activity_id                  ,activity_bizdate                  ,activity_at                  ,ticket_status            FROM   @ticket_status;            --            -- TODO: check whether need to update below status from ap payout message            -- ticket status            --EXEC dbo.uspnc_ticket_status_update             --     @ticket_status_new,            --     @ticket_action,            --     @system_datetime;            --            -- payout            EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_payout                  @payout_new,                 @system_datetime;    -- DivCal     /*     Logic : AP will not generate DivCal if the Payout of cash bet prior to AP perform DivCal.     Therefore, if there is a payout (is_partial = false) + normal payout (act code = 12) (i.e. not cancel payout/ reverse payout)    and missing divcal done message in     */    --checking whether this record is fit to insert into divcal    IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @payout_new WHERE is_partial = 0) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @activity WHERE activity_code = 12)    BEGIN    --check whether divcal missing the corresponding divcal done record. No worry, dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal will perform upsert    DECLARE @update_activity_id BIGINT = NULL;    SELECT @update_activity_id = update_activity_id    FROM ticket_divcal    WHERE system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id -- this composite key, therefore I should get only 1 record    IF @update_activity_id IS NULL OR @update_activity_id < @activity_id -- divcal record not exists or divcal record is older than payout activity    BEGIN    DECLARE @divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;    INSERT INTO @divcal_new       (bizdate       ,system_id       ,ticket_id       ,child_ticket_id       ,divcal_amount       ,selective_refund_amount       ,is_divcal_done       ,activity_id)    SELECT bizdate      ,system_id      ,@ticket_id      ,ticket_id      ,divcal_amount      ,selective_refund_amount      ,is_divcal_done      ,activity_id    FROM   @divcal;    --    -- divcal    EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal      @divcal_new,     @system_datetime;    --    -- divcal plc for selective refund    EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc      @divcal_plc,     @system_datetime;                        END --end of checking whether exists of ticket_divcal record with divcal done = 0 and smaller activity id                 END -- end of checking whether this record is fit to insert into divcal        END        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1510(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabiSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT ticket.kick_off_dateAS MatchDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory, COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfUnsettledTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnsettledLiabilityFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id,     kickoffdate_vw.event_settle_date as kick_off_date,          --get the match kickoff date dynamically--ftc.kick_off_date,--tfe.channel_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,edabi_vw.channel_id,1 AS sbpoolcategory,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0)AS paid_bizdate,--to check if ticket be paidAVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id)AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id)AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_id LEFT JOIN  dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate_vw ON ftc.pool_id = kickoffdate_vw.pool_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 0AND ftd.div_cal_amt >0--winning and refund tickets AND ft.update_bizdate <= @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status in (2, 7, 8) -- sell, paid, partial_paidAND fme.event_type_id = 2         --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Match pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id --FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('HAD', 'FHAD', 'ETHAD', 'HHAD', 'HDC', 'ETHDC', 'HILO', 'FHLO', --'ETHILO', 'CHLO', 'ETCHLO', 'CRS', 'FCRS', 'ETCRS', 'FTS', 'NTS', 'ETNTS', 'TTG', 'ETTTG', 'OOE', 'FGS', 'HFT','MSPC', 'DHCP')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.kick_off_date, ticket.channel_id, ticket.sbpoolcategoryORDER BY ticket.kick_off_date, ticket.channel_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_csa_account_snapshot(-- These two parameters just solve app message@task_id                                     BIGINT   ,@checkpoint_id                               BIGINT--Data Parameters   ,@category         dbo.udt_account_snapshot_category READONLY   ,@description   dbo.udt_account_snapshot_description READONLY   ,@group               dbo.udt_account_snapshot_group READONLY   ,@summary           dbo.udt_account_snapshot_summary READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                           NVARCHAR(500) OUTPUT)ASBEGIN-- Set ,@account_snapshot_checkpoint_id      BIGINT = 0  ,@operation_type                 VARCHAR(50) = ''  ,@error_message                  VARCHAR(500);DECLARE    @report_key CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1520(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemIF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)END--sold and canceled on todaySELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.Channel, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.flag = 1 THEN 1 END)- COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 4)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketSold ,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.flag = 1  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )- SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 4)  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketSold,COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.selling_centre_no = ticket.cancel_centre_no)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketCancelledOfSelfCentre,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.selling_centre_no = ticket.cancel_centre_no)  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketCancelledOfSelfCentre,COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 3)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketCancelledForOtherCentre,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 3)  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketCancelledForOtherCentre,COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.selling_centre_no <> ticket.cancel_centre_no)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketCancelledByOtherCentre,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.flag = 2 AND ticket.selling_centre_no <> ticket.cancel_centre_no)  THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END )AS InvestmentOfTicketCancelledByOtherCentreFROM (--sold on today SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fasc_sell.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,0 AS cancel_centre_no,--cancel_centre_no--tfe.channel_id AS Channel,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id AS Channel,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory AS SBPoolCategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,1 AS flag,--soldAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_id    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_id                --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idWHERE ftc.leg_order = 1--for allup tickets , only leg firstAND ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status IN (2, 5, 7)--2SOLD; 7 PAID; 8 PARTIAL_PAIDAND fme.event_type_id = 1                                               --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')--)UNION --cancel on SelfCentre on todaySELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate,--ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fasc_sell.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)  AS cancel_centre_no,--cancel_centre_no--tfe.channel_id AS Channel,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id AS Channel,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory AS SBPoolCategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,2 AS flag,--sold by centre noAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw fac ON ft.ticket_id = fac.ticket_id AND fac.ticket_status = 5    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_id                --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw cancel ON cancel.fo_activity_id = fac.fo_activity_id --cancel centre_noWHERE ft.is_cancel = 1AND ftc.leg_order = 1--for allup tickets , only leg firstANDfac.create_bizdate = @bizdate--AND ft.update_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5--5CANCELLEDAND fme.event_type_id = 1                                               --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 UNION--Other Centre means that ticket which sold at other centre, but cancelled at this centre.SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate,ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--cancelled at this centreISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)  AS cancel_centre_no,--cancel_centre_no--tfe.channel_id AS Channel,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id AS Channel,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory AS SBPoolCategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,3 AS flag,--canceled by centre noAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw fac ON ft.ticket_id = fac.ticket_id AND fac.ticket_status = 5--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw cancel ON cancel.fo_activity_id = fac.fo_activity_id --cancel centre_no    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 1AND ftc.leg_order = 1--for allup tickets , only leg firstANDfac.create_bizdate = @bizdate--AND ft.update_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5--5CANCELLED--AND ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0)  <> ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)--Sold at other centre, but cancelled at this centreAND ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) <> ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)AND fme.event_type_id = 1                                               --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 UNION--deduct cancel ticketsSELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.selling_bizdate,--ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fasc_sell.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(cancel.centre_no, 0)  AS cancel_centre_no,--cancel_centre_no--tfe.channel_id AS Channel,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id AS Channel,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory AS SBPoolCategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS SBPoolCategory,4 AS flag,--sold by centre noAVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw fac ON ft.ticket_id = fac.ticket_id AND fac.ticket_status = 5    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_id                --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw cancel ON cancel.fo_activity_id = fac.fo_activity_id --cancel centre_noWHERE ft.is_cancel = 1AND ftc.leg_order = 1--for allup tickets , only leg first--AND ft.selling_bizdate < @bizdateANDfac.create_bizdate = @bizdate--AND ft.update_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5--5CANCELLEDAND fme.event_type_id = 1                                              ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.Channel,ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_idORDER BY ticket.Channel,ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id OPTION(MAXDOP 1) END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1522(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabiDECLARE @payout_expired_bizdate a.payout_expire_bizdateINTO ##tmp_fo_edabi_rptFROM settled_fo_tickets a JOIN settled_fo_ticket_dividends b ON a.ticket_id=b.ticket_idGROUP BY b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateENDset @payout_expired_bizdate = @bizdate--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketUnpaid,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfHOTicketUnpaid,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidHOLiabilityAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets, --no FO ticket forfeited SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN (div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedHOTickets,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN (div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedHOAmount--COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,--SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmount,--COUNT(CASE WHEN ( ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.is_head_office = 1) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,--SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.is_head_office = 1) THEN ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_noISNULL(fts.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id,5) AS channel_id, -- hard code 5 if case that activities purgedfmp.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win, ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ftd.is_settled,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id--INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = fmp.pool_id    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON fmp.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3 on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.ticket_status = 2 -- sell, paid, partial_paidAND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt >0--winning and refund tickets --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 ConcludedAND fme.event_type_id = 1--AND fmp.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory  OPTION(MAXDOP 1) END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_get_ba_rpt_1121](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' ENDAS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS CentreNo, SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.all_up_level = 1) THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FOInvestmentOfSingleTicketSold,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.all_up_level = 1) THEN ticket.refund_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FORefundOfSingleTicketSold,0AS > 1) THEN ticket.refund_amt  ELSE 0 END) AS FORefundOfAllUpTicketSold,0AS AllUpReinvestmentFROM (SELECT--DISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ftb.frontend_id, --dbo.udf_get_BusinessDateOfEvent(ftc.pool_id) AS kick_off_date,get_kickoffdate_vw.event_settle_date as kick_off_date,ft.all_up_level ,orig_fts.selling_centre_no, ft.parent_ticket_id,ftd.refund_amt,ft.ticket_cost_amt--AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,--AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftc.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amt--ftd.refund_amt,--ft.ticket_cost_amtFROM (select h.event_id,h.frontend_id from fo_msg_events h  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status event_status on event_status.event_id=h.event_id  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids j on h.event_id=j.event_id  INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = j.pool_idwhere   kickoffdate.event_settle_date >= @bizdate   and event_status.event_operation_status >= 4  and h.frontend_id is not nullUNION select h.event_id,b.frontend_id from (select ftd.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_idfrom fo_ticket_dividends ftdJOIN fo_ticket_betlines ftb on ftd.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idJOIN fo_tickets ft on ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idwhere (ftd.is_settled = 0 or ftd.settle_bizdate = @bizdate)andft.ticket_status in (2,7)unionselect ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_idfrom settled_fo_tickets ftJOINsettled_fo_ticket_dividends ftdon ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idJOINsettled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))onft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idwhere (ftd.is_settled = 0 or ftd.settle_bizdate = @bizdate)andft.ticket_status in (2,7)) b--fo_ticket_betlines_vw b --inner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw d on d.ticket_id = b.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids h on b.pool_id=h.pool_id--inner join fo_msg_events h on h.frontend_id = b.frontend_id --where d.is_settled = 0 or d.settle_bizdate = @bizdategroup by h.event_id,b.frontend_id) events--@tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id eventsINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids legs on events.event_id=legs.event_idINNER JOIN (select ticket_id, frontend_id, pool_idfrom fo_ticket_betlinesunionselect ticket_id, frontend_id, pool_idfrom settled_fo_ticket_betlines  with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))) ftb--dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON legs.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft on ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id=ftb.pool_id --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_asc_activities_pool_vw faapv ON ftc.pool_id = faapv.pool_id AND faapv.[status] = 41 --PayoutStarted--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_vw fav ON fav.fo_activity_id = faapv.fo_activity_id INNER JOIN get_kickoffdate_vw on fmp.pool_id = get_kickoffdate_vw.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw orig_fts ON ft.orig_ticket_id = orig_fts.ticket_idWHERE --ft.is_cancel = 0--AND ft.ticket_status <> 3 --REJECTED--AND (--(ftd.is_concluded = 0 ) --Only non-concluded ticket is included. --OR --(ftd.concluded_bizdate >= @bizdate)----(ftd.is_concluded = 1 AND  fav.activity_bizdate = @bizdate AND fmp.concluded_date = @bizdate) --this pool is payoutStarted and Concluded on Day 3, shown from Day 2 to Day 3 workfile--)--AND ft.selling_bizdate <= @bizdate--AND ISNULL(ft.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0ft.ticket_status in (2,7)) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.sports_id, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END, ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0), ticket.selling_centre_noOPTION(MAXDOP 1)--OPTION(LOOP JOIN, FORCE ORDER, MAXDOP 1)--OPTION(LOOP JOIN, FORCE ORDER, USE HINT('ENABLE_PARALLEL_PLAN_PREFERENCE'), MAXDOP 5)--OPTION (QUERYTRACEON 8649)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code =
