CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert(@tvp_ticket_location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_location   (system_id   ,sell_bizdate   ,ticket_id   ,activity_id   ,ticket_action   ,process_location   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,is_svt   ,is_on_course   ,esc_no   ,terminal_no   ,ngbt_bet_mode   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,activity_id  ,@ticket_action  ,process_location  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,is_svt  ,is_on_course  ,esc_no  ,terminal_no  ,ngbt_bet_mode  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_id  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_locationWHERE  ticket_id > 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_summary_snapshot_calculation(@task_id             BIGINT   ,@checkpoint_id       BIGINT   ,@payout_date           DATE   ,@is_cross_date          BIT OUTPUT   ,@return_msg    VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @now         DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@tran_count        INT = 0  ,@return_code       INT = 0;SET @is_cross_date = 0;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYDECLARE    @update_tickets AS TABLE(system_id      TINYINT NOT NULL   ,ticket_id       BIGINT NOT NULL   ,settle_bizdate    DATE   ,settle_status  TINYINT   ,cashout_status TINYINT);-- 1. Set the settle_status of all ""lose"" tickets to 4.UPDATE    fSET       f.settle_status = 4,f.settle_bizdate = pc.settle_bizdate,f.update_at = @now,f.pay_odds = NULL,f.profit_loss = -f.unit_bet,f.investment = f.unit_betOUTPUT inserted.system_id  ,inserted.ticket_id  ,inserted.settle_bizdate  ,inserted.settle_status  ,inserted.cashout_status   INTO @update_ticketsFROM      dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f  CROSS APPLY(SELECT TOP 1 ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate) AS settle_bizdateFROM         dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination ac INNER JOIN dbo.pools p ON ac.pool_id = p.pool_id AND ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate) IS NOT NULLWHERE        f.system_id = ac.system_id AND f.ticket_id = ac.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = ac.bet_id AND ac.settle_status = 4ORDER BY ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate)) pcWHERE f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status IN(0,2) AND f.is_allup = 1;-- 2. Set no payout tickets to 0UPDATE fSET    f.settle_status = 0,f.update_at = @now,f.pay_odds = NULL,f.cashout_status = 0OUTPUT inserted.system_id  ,inserted.ticket_id  ,inserted.settle_bizdate  ,inserted.settle_status  ,deleted.cashout_status   INTO @update_ticketsFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status = 2 AND f.is_allup = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination cWHERE  f.system_id = c.system_id AND f.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = c.bet_id AND c.settle_status = 0);-- 3. Set the settle_status of all ""win/refund"" tickets to 1UPDATE    fSET       f.settle_bizdate = ISNULL(c.settle_bizdate,f.settle_bizdate),f.profit_loss = ISNULL(c.odds*f.unit_bet-f.unit_bet,0),f.investment = f.unit_bet*(1-c.is_payout_refund),f.refund = f.unit_bet*c.is_payout_refund,f.settle_status = 1,f.dividend = CASE c.is_payout_refund WHEN 0 THEN c.odds*f.unit_bet ELSE 0 END,f.pay_odds = c.odds,f.update_at = @nowOUTPUT inserted.system_id  ,inserted.ticket_id  ,inserted.settle_bizdate  ,inserted.settle_status  ,inserted.cashout_status   INTO @update_ticketsFROM      dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f  INNER JOIN(SELECT system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,CAST(EXP(SUM(c.pay_odds)) AS DECIMAL(28,12)) AS         odds  ,IIF(MIN(c.settle_status) = 3,1,0) AS                    is_payout_refund  ,COUNT(1) AS                                             leg_count  ,MAX(ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate)) AS settle_bizdateFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination c   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p ON c.pool_id = p.pool_idWHERE  c.settle_status IN(2,3) AND c.pay_odds IS NOT NULLGROUP BY c.system_id,c.ticket_id,c.bet_id) c ON f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status = 2 AND f.is_allup = 1 AND f.system_id = c.system_id AND f.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = c.bet_id AND f.allup_level = c.leg_count;-- 4. Restore settle_status of all unhandled tickets to 2. UPDATE fSET    f.settle_status = 2,f.update_at = @nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status = 0 AND f.is_allup = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination cWHERE  f.system_id = c.system_id AND f.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = c.bet_id AND c.settle_status IN(2,3)) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination cWHERE  f.system_id = c.system_id AND f.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = c.bet_id AND c.settle_status = 0);-- 5: Set the settle_status of Single ""win/refund/lose"" tickets to 1UPDATE fSET    f.settle_status = IIF(s.settle_status = 0 OR ISNULL(p.settle_bizdate,ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate)) IS NULL,0,1),f.settle_bizdate = IIF(s.settle_status = 0 OR ISNULL(p.settle_bizdate,ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate)) IS NULL,f.settle_bizdate,ISNULL(p.settle_bizdate,ISNULL(p.payout_start_bizdate,p.refund_bizdate))),f.unit_bet = s.unit_bet,f.profit_loss = s.unit_bet*(s.pay_odds)-s.unit_bet,f.investment = IIF(s.settle_status = 3,0,s.unit_bet),f.refund = IIF(s.settle_status = 3,s.unit_bet,0),f.pay_odds = s.odds,f.update_at = @now,f.dividend = IIF(s.settle_status != 3,s.unit_bet*s.pay_odds,0),f.cashout_status = 0OUTPUT inserted.system_id  ,inserted.ticket_id  ,inserted.settle_bizdate  ,inserted.settle_status  ,deleted.cashout_status   INTO @update_ticketsFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single s ON s.system_id = f.system_id AND s.ticket_id = f.ticket_id AND s.bet_id = f.bet_id AND f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status = 2 AND f.is_allup = 0   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p ON f.pool_id = p.pool_id;DECLARE    @update_cashout_tickets AS TABLE(system_id           TINYINT NOT NULL   ,ticket_id            BIGINT NOT NULL   ,is_pending              BIT NOT NULL   ,cashout_status      TINYINT   ,prev_cashout_status TINYINT   ,cashout_bizdate        DATE);-- 1. As long as its ES status has ever included a value of 1, the ES ticket's value needs to be recalculated.INSERT INTO @update_cashout_tickets   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,is_pending   ,cashout_status   ,prev_cashout_status   ,cashout_bizdate)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,0  ,a.cashout_status  ,a.cashout_status  ,c.cashout_bizdateFROM   @update_tickets a   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket c ON a.system_id = c.system_id AND a.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND c.settle_status > 0 AND a.cashout_status = 1;-- 2. As long as the ES ticket's status is not 0, if unsettled_ticket_bet_financial has already been paid out, the ES status of unsettled_ticket_bet_financial needs to be reset, and the ES ticket's value needs to be recalculated.UPDATE fSET    f.cashout_status = IIF(c.cashout_bizdate > f.settle_bizdate,1,2),f.update_at = @nowOUTPUT inserted.system_id  ,inserted.ticket_id  ,0  ,inserted.cashout_status  ,deleted.cashout_status  ,inserted.settle_bizdate   INTO @update_cashout_ticketsFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f   INNER JOIN @update_tickets a ON f.system_id = a.system_id AND f.ticket_id = a.ticket_id AND a.settle_status IN(1,4)   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket c ON a.system_id = c.system_id AND a.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND c.settle_status > 0;-- 3. As long as the ES ticket's status is 0 and unsettled_ticket_bet_financial has already been paid out, the ES status of unsettled_ticket_bet_financial needs to be reset, and the ES ticket's value needs to be recalculated.--    To avoid potential performance issues, do not update more than 50,000 records of unsettled_cashout_ticket at a time.INSERT INTO @update_cashout_tickets   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,is_pending   ,cashout_status   ,prev_cashout_status   ,cashout_bizdate)SELECT TOP 50000 ct.system_id,ct.ticket_id,1,1,1,ct.cashout_bizdateFROM             dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket ctWHERE            cashout_bizdate = @payout_date AND settle_status = 0;UPDATE fSET    f.cashout_status = IIF(tt.cashout_bizdate > f.settle_bizdate,1,2),f.update_at = @nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f   INNER JOIN @update_cashout_tickets tt ON f.system_id = tt.system_id AND f.ticket_id = tt.ticket_id AND f.settle_status IN(1,4) AND tt.is_pending = 1;UPDATE cSET    c.settle_status = 1,c.update_at = @nowFROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket cWHERE  EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   @update_cashout_tickets aWHERE  a.system_id = c.system_id AND a.ticket_id = c.ticket_id AND (a.cashout_status = 1 OR a.prev_cashout_status = 1));IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   @update_ticketsWHERE  settle_bizdate < @payout_date)BEGINSET @is_cross_date = 1;END;IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 41302 THEN 0  ELSE @orig_err_num  END;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1534](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.selling_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket_status in (2,5,7) THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END)) -SUM(ticket.cancel_amt) AS NetSalesAmount,--NetSalesAmount = Ticket Investment today ?Cancelled Ticket Investment (Cancel is made today)ROUND(SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - ticket.refund_amt) - (isnull(previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0))) <> 0 AND ticket.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate THEN (ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - ticket.refund_amt) - (isnull(previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0))) ELSE 0 END) ), 0)AS WinningLiability,--Liability amount of winning tickets (refund tickets are excluded)SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0)) <> 0 AND ticket.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END) )AS RefundLiability --Liability amount of refund tickets (winning tickets are excluded)FROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --tfe.channel_id,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_cancel,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_status,ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt,  AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS actual_div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for same ticketAVG(previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for parent ticketAVG(previous_ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_refund_amt,AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amt,0 AS cancel_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw previous_ftd on ft.parent_ticket_id = previous_ftd.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( -- check previous latest dividend historyselect a.ticket_id, a.actual_div_cal_amt, a.div_cal_amt, a.bizdate, a.refund_amt from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ainner join ( select ftdbb.ticket_id , max(bizdate) as bizdate from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ftdbbinner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd on ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate and ftdbb.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idwhere ftdbb.bizdate < @bizdate group by ftdbb.ticket_id) b on a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id and a.bizdate = b.bizdate) previous_ftdbb on previous_ftdbb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idWHERE ftc.bet_type_id IN (--special pool bet_type_id32, 33, 34, 35/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('TSPC', 'MSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')  --tournament TSPC eventlevel1, match  MSPC eventlevel2*/)AND (ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate or ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate)AND ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7, 8)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 --cancel ticketunion SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --tfe.channel_id,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,1 AS is_cancel,0 AS selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_status AS ticket_status,0 AS div_cal_done_bizdate,0 AS paid_bizdate,0 AS total_payout_amt, 0 AS div_cal_amt,0 AS actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS refund_amt,0 AS previous_div_cal_amt,0 AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS previous_refund_amt,0 AS parent_div_cal_amt,0 AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS parent_refund_amt,0 AS ticket_cost_amt,AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftc.ticket_id) AS cancel_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idWHERE ftc.bet_type_id IN (--special pool bet_type_id32, 33, 34, 35/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('TSPC', 'MSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')  --tournament TSPC eventlevel1, match  MSPC eventlevel2*/)AND cancel.ticket_status = 5 AND cancel.create_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory  OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1508(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tempdb.sys.tables WHERE name='##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt')BEGINSELECT b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateINTO ##tmp_fo_edabi_rptFROM settled_fo_tickets a JOIN settled_fo_ticket_dividends b ON a.ticket_id=b.ticket_idGROUP BY b.div_cal_done_bizdate, a.payout_expire_bizdateENDSELECT ticket.event_settle_dateAS MatchDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory, COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketUnpaid,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfHOTicketUnpaid,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1  THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS UnpaidHOLiabilityAmount,-- SET 0 below , Because FO no forfeitedSUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS TodayPurgedAmount,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )AS NoOfTodayPurgedHOTickets,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS TodayPurgedHOAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date,--tfe.selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,ISNULL(fts.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id,5) AS channel_id, -- hard code 5 if case that activities purged1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win, ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,ft.previous_payout_amt,ft.total_payout_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,ft.ticket_status,ftd.is_settled-- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, -- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, -- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                 --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftb.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3 on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.ticket_status = 2--AND ftc.leg_order = 1--For all up bet or a ticket including more than one bet, the figure will be grouped to the day by calculating the earliest calendar date corresponds to the “Day” of the match in the betAND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt >0--covers match pool winning and refund tickets --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 ConcludedAND fme.event_type_id = 2           --AND fmp.bet_type_id IN --(--Match pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id --FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('HAD', 'FHAD', 'ETHAD', 'HHAD', 'HDC', 'ETHDC', 'HILO', 'FHLO', --'ETHILO', 'CHLO', 'ETCHLO', 'CRS', 'FCRS', 'ETCRS', 'FTS', 'NTS', 'ETNTS', 'TTG', 'ETTTG', 'OOE', 'FGS', 'HFT','MSPC', 'DHCP')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.event_settle_date, ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.sbpoolcategoryORDER BY ticket.event_settle_date, ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.sbpoolcategory OPTION(MAXDOP 1) END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_defer_activity_insert(    @system_id                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime           DATETIME2   ,@start_activity_id            BIGINT   ,@end_activity_id              BIGINT   ,@tbl_activity_id   dbo.udt_bigint_id READONLY)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code                    INT = 0          ,@error_message       NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@bizdate                      DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@activity_id                BIGINT          ,@tmp_activity_id dbo.udt_bigint_id;    IF ISNULL(@start_activity_id,0) = 0 OR ISNULL(@end_activity_id,0) = 0    BEGIN        INSERT INTO @tmp_activity_id        SELECT id        FROM   @tbl_activity_id;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        SELECT @activity_id = @start_activity_id;        WHILE @activity_id <= @end_activity_id        BEGIN            INSERT INTO @tmp_activity_id                   (id)            VALUES                   (@activity_id);            SELECT @activity_id = @activity_id+1;        END;    END;    --    INSERT INTO dbo.defer_activity           (system_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_id           ,activity_status           ,create_at           ,update_at)    SELECT @system_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.id          ,0          ,@system_datetime          ,@system_datetime    FROM   @tmp_activity_id a    WHERE  NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.log_activity l WITH (FORCESEEK)        WHERE  l.system_id = @system_id AND l.activity_id = a.id    ) AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.defer_activity d WITH (FORCESEEK)        WHERE  d.system_id = @system_id AND d.activity_id = a.id    );END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_activity_insert(    -- activity    @tvp_activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg          NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @tvp_activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_inbound_db_log_messages_c_insert](--Input Parameters@intervalTINYINT = 0,@limit_counterINT = 99999999,--2023-02-28 Samuel Un : Add limit counter to limit records move from Procedures\dbo.usp_inbound_db_log_messages_c_insert (before FF-58539).sql""SET NOCOUNT ON-- Drop temp table #tmp_log_messages_hIF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#tmp_log_messages_h') IS NOT NULLDROP TABLE NULL,[msg_seq_no] [bigint] NOT NULL,[meta_header] [nvarchar](4000) NOT NULL,[message] [varbinary](max) NOT NULL,[received_datetime] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL)-- Declare System variables .DECLARE @tran_count  INT = 0       ,@return_code INT = 0   ,@qry_limit   INT = 4000    ,@row_count   INT = 0 IF @limit_counter < @qry_limit BEGIN    SET @qry_limit = @limit_counterENDSET @effectiveRowCount = 0--PRINT 'Before while @qry_limit=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @qry_limit) + ' @limit_counter=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @limit_counter) + ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)--DECLARE @dbg_loop_count INT = 0-- 2023-04-24 A.Datta FF-58539 : Use while loop to do deletes in small batches and use delete ... output ... into log_tickets_cWHILE 1 = 1BEGINBEGIN DELETED.received_datetime,COMPRESS(DELETED.meta_header) as meta_header_com,COMPRESS(DELETED.[message]) as message_com,1 as iscompressed INTO log_messages_c(topic_name, version_id, topic_seq_no, ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)--END-- Break loop when limit is reached or last delete results in no rowsIF (@effectiveRowCount >= @limit_counter OR @row_count = 0)BEGIN    --PRINT 'Before BREAK loop=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @dbg_loop_count) + ' @row_count=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @row_count) + ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)BREAKENDEND TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 BEGIN    ROLLBACK TRANSACTIONEND-- Drop temp table #tmp_log_messages_hIF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#tmp_log_messages_h') IS NOT NULLDROP TABLE #tmp_log_messages_hBEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()SET @return_msg  = SUBSTRING('ERROR in ' + ERROR_PROCEDURE() + ' line ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE()) + ': ' + ERROR_MESSAGE(), 1, 500)ENDEND CATCHEND -- End of WHILE 1 = 1RETURN @return_codeEND

      ,TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket   ,update_time)SELECT  @update_bizdate,    ISNULL(c.sports_id, 0) as SportsID,c.event_id as event_id,CASE WHEN c.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(c.frontend_id, '') ELSE ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  --41 PayoutStarted            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND (c.payout_expire_bizdate<=@payout_expired_bizdate AND c.payout_expire_bizdate <> 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - sports_id,fme.frontend_id,fme.event_id,kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,ft.ticket_status,isnull(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ft.paid_bizdate,ftd.is_div_cal_done,ft.previous_payout_amt,ft.total_payout_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,ftd.is_settled-- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, -- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, -- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM(select expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)and ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8) -- exclude reject & cancelunionselect ft.ticket_id, group by h.event_id,b.frontend_id) fme --@tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id fmeINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status fmes on fmes.event_id = fme.event_idINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids eiwli ON eiwli.event_id = fme.event_idINNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = eiwli.pool_id--INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.all_up_node_key = fme.event_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ftd.ticket_id LEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_ba_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdate--ANDftc.leg_order = 1--AND ftc.combination_order = 1) AS c  GROUP by c.sports_id ,c.event_id,(CASE WHEN c.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(c.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END) , ISNULL(c.kick_off_date, 0) OPTION(MAXDOP 1)-- 2.2 udpate fo_rpt_ba_1321IF (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM fo_rpt_ba_1321)>1BEGIN  UPDATE today_1321   SET    TotalNoOfExpiredTicket           = ISNULL(pre_1321.TotalNoOfExpiredTicket, 0) + ISNULL(today_1321.NoOfExpiredTicketToday, 0)  ,TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket     = ISNULL(pre_1321.TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket, 0) + ,update_time DESC) AS row_id, * FROM  dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1321 WHERE bizdate = @update_bizdate) b   WHERE pre_1321.row_id=1    )END--3.0 RETURN data SELECT   sports_id AS SportsID,frontend_id AS  FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY bizdate,sports_id ,event_id ORDER BY bizdate ,update_time DESC) AS row_id, *  FROM  dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1321 WHERE bizdate = @update_bizdate) b   WHERE b.row_id=1END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code
